issues.detail: The skill examples do not cover error handling or edge cases.
The examples rely on Node.js-specific APIs, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: sales-table-report
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A lacks the specified classes and methods.

scenarios.name: header-footer-page-numbers
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A lacks the required classes and page number implementation.
